sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 293 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1609/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.1 3. For orders on CMA No.1610/2025 4. For orders on CMA No.1611/2025 5. For hearing of main case 23.12.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, advocate for the applicant Mr. Faheem Ali, advocate for respondent It is jointly stated that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned order and remand the matter for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
